description: Copy of a letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Written on a reused fragment of a letter in Arabic script (the only part preserved is the basmala and the opening "ṣalawāt Allāh wa-bara[kātuh]"). Describing the endeavors of Abū Saʿd "the seventh" to become head of the Jews by bribing the vizier ('mutawallī bāb al-sulṭān') Ibn al-Salār. These endeavors were directed against the court physician and head of the Jews, the Nagid Abū Manṣūr Shemuel b. Ḥananya (in office 1140–59 with interruptions). (Information from Mediterranean Society, II, 32, 528, and M. A. Friedman's article on Zuta, p. 479.)
description_he: עותק מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מתאר את מאמצי אבו סעד השביעי להיות ראש היהודים באמצעות שוחד לווזיר, נגד הרופא החצרן ראש היהודים הנגיד שמואל ב' חנניה (בתפקיד 1140-59).
